column5: EFFECTS
Passive Effect Description
column12: Passive Visual (what does it look like during match?)
column13: Active Visual (what does activation look like?)

column5: Units with a merge rank of 5 or higher increase their damage by 4.2% for each merge rank.
Increases the armor of the opponent's monsters by 8.25%. The armor of summoned monsters is increased by 16.5%. In Co-Op, reduces the armor of monsters on the ally's field.
Units increase their damage by 2.3% for each merge rank between 2 and 4.
If a unit receives a negative effect, other units have their damage increased by 10.4% for 9s. Triggers at most once every 11s.
At the start of the next wave, charges 43% of spells if you were the first to defeat the wave's bosses.
Killing a boss or mini boss has a 21.5% chance to remove negative effects from 1 unit. The effect activates after a delay of 3s.
When a unit is absorbed, has a 21% chance to summon a random unit of merge rank 1.
column6: 21% chance to summon rank 1 on absorb

column5: All units deal 21% more damage. This bonus is reduced by 4.2% for each unique faction in the deck.
Damage dealt by the Damage type units is increased by 1.1% for every unit of a different type on the field.
column6: +1.1% per different unit type on field

column4: Does not work in Co-Op mode.
column5: When a mini boss is killed, has a 44% chance to summon a weakened Bannerlord or Vortex mini boss.
column6: 44% chance to spawn weakened mini boss

column5: If you dealt less damage against the Phantom, the bosses will freeze and become afflicted with silence for 2.1s after appearing.
column6: 2.1s freeze + silence on bosses if Phantom damage was lower

column5: Has a 29% chance of returning 50% of mana spent when you summon a unit.

column4: Does not work in Co-Op mode.
column5: When the health is below the maximum (1-2 hearts), the damage dealt by all units is increased by 11%.
column6: +11% damage when health not at maximum

column5: When the opponent uses a hero's abilities, the damage dealt by your units increases by 11% for 5s.
column6: +11% damage for 5s after opponent hero ability

column5: When the opponent or the ally is afflicted with a negative effect, you have a 16% chance to receive 200 extra mana.

When a boss is killed, curses an enemy unit at the end of the round, reducing the merge rank after 5s. Has a 35% chance to curse another unit as well. The curse disappears when a unit is merged in the tile. Increases the merge rank of an allied unit in Co-Op.
column6: Curse 1 unit (−1 rank after 5s); 35% chance 2nd curse; Co-Op increases ally rank

column4: Does not work in Co-Op mode.
column5: You lose 1 heart at the beginning of the battle, but start gaining 16.5% more mana.
The damage dealt by units is increased by 2% for each unique faction in the deck. If all units in the deck belong to different factions, the damage is additionally increased by 6%.
column6: +2% per unique faction; +6% if all units from different factions

column5: When a heart is lost, causes a tsunami that pushes monsters back, dealing damage equal to 33% of current health to regular monsters (16.5% to bosses and mini bosses).
column6: 33% current HP to regulars; 16.5% to bosses/mini bosses

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck.
column5: Creates 5 tiles on the field. Units in these tiles have their damage increased by 1% for every merging in the tile, up to 30%. Every wave, the tiles lose 1% of the bonus.

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck. Does not work on bosses.
column5: Creates 4 tiles on the field. When a unit is merged within this tile, in PvP heals bosses and mini bosses by 10.5% of their current health and summoned monsters by 26%. In Co-Op damages monsters for 10.5% of their current health. A tile moves when a unit is merged inside it or when a wave ends.
column6: 10.5% HP heal to bosses/mini bosses (PvP); 26% to summoned; 10.5% damage (Co-Op)

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck. Can be obtained as a reward.
column5: Creates 2 Sacrifice Tiles in the field's corners at battle start. Every 16s, units in the Sacrifice Tiles lose 1 merge rank and grant 1 Sacrifice Charge per rank of the unit. The damage dealt by units on the field increases by 1.5% for each Sacrifice Charge received. Maximum bonus of 16.5%.
column6: +1.5% per Sacrifice Charge (max 16.5%); costs 1 merge rank per 16s

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck.
column5: Creates 2 tiles on the field. Once every 14s, units of merge rank 1 are summoned to these tiles.
column6: Rank 1 unit summoned to tile every 14s

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck.
column5: Creates 4 tiles on the field. Merging, leveling up or absorbing units on the tiles increases the damage inflicted by all units by 0.5%. Tiles move when the damage is increased or at the end of a wave. Maximum damage: +18%.

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck.
column5: Creates 4 tiles on the field. Merging units in these tiles accumulates charges. When 4 charges are accumulated in PvP, reduces the attack speed of the opponent's units by 21% for 15s (in Co-Op, increases the attack speed of ally's units). Tiles move after merging or when a wave ends.

column4: Only one can be selected for the deck. Can be obtained as a reward.
column5: Creates a tile in one of the corners of the field. The pawn on it loses a merge rank every 15s, in return granting the pawn in the first deck slot with the highest merge rank a 22.5% damage bonus and a one-time shield that lasts for 15s.
column6: 22.5% damage bonus + one-time shield for 15s; costs 1 merge rank every 15s
